{{Quote|The ''Prosecutor'' was our first home: we were stationed there for a long time.|Boss, on the ''Prosecutor''|<ref name="RC" />}}
The '''''Prosecutor''''' was a highly modified [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="RC" /> The ship became infamous in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]] when it was boarded by a hostile crew of [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Enslaver|slavers]] and [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]]. After wiping out the majority of the crew and taking control of the ship, the Trandoshans planned to hand the damaged but functional ''Prosecutor'' over to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. The [[Clone commando/Legends|Clone Commandos]] of [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]] were later sent to investigate what had happened and ultimately kept the ''Prosecutor'' from being handed over to the enemy.

==History==
===Battle of Geonosis===
Commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Martz]], the ''Prosecutor'' participated in the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]]. When the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] of [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]] successfully managed to sabotage a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Core ship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class core ship]] that was still waiting to launch, a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]] [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]] from the ''Prosecutor'' evacuated the commandos from a side breach in the hull of the enemy [[Warship/Legends|warship]], and Delta [[Squad/Legends|Squad]] returned to the ''Prosecutor''.<ref name="RC" />

===Capture===
After the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], the ''Prosecutor'' was given the task of defending [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade routes]] in the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]]. During its patrol,  the ''Prosecutor'' was boarded by a small army of [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] slavers and mercenaries. Caught off guard by the intruders, the ships crew and clone trooper personnel were unable to stop the Trandoshans from taking control of the ship’s bridge where they set up a jamming device to prevent any survivors from calling for help. While the Trandoshans were able to take control of the ship section by section, they found it difficult to eliminate the surviving Clone Troopers as many of them had either gone into hiding or had fortified themselves into well defended positions.<ref name="RC" />

===Infiltration===
[[File:Prosecutor-RC.png|thumb|left|The ''Prosecutor'' orbiting above the Chaykin Cluster]]
When the ''Prosecutor'' reappeared two weeks later in the [[Corbantis system/Legends|Corbantis system]], within the [[Chaykin Cluster]] and nowhere near [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], on the edge of Confederacy-controlled territory, the highly renowned [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone]] commandos of Delta Squad were called in to investigate the matter. They found the ''Prosecutor'' drifting in space, powerless. Using a [[CR25 troop carrier/Legends|CR25 troop carrier]], they infiltrated the ghost ship via the four starboard heavy [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton missile]] tubes. Their primary objective was to retrieve the four data cores—the flight recorders that would have detected what had happened to the ''Prosecutor'' and left it hanging dead in space. Each commando was responsible for a single data core.<ref name="RC" />

As the commandos entered at their respective ingress points, a [[Sensor jammer/Legends|sensor jammer]] was activated and cut off their communication from the tactical coordinator on the CR25 carrier, [[Advisor/Legends|clone advisor]] [[01/425]]. As they made their way aft through the labyrinth of catwalks, corridors, and mazes of coolant pipes in the engineering section, the commandos were ambushed by scavenger droids and slavers. Meanwhile, [[Boss (clone commando)/Legends|Boss]], the commander of Delta Squad, arrived at Sev's location and watched helplessly as the trooper was ambushed. He also discovered that many surviving clones were still on the ship. However, the majority of these were later killed by either enemy [[Salvage droid/Legends|scavenger droids]] or the Trandoshans that had taken control of the ship.<ref name="RC" />

To add to the mystery of the ''Prosecutor'', Boss found a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] in a service corridor during his mission on the ship. However, instead of the lightsaber lying next to the body of a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], it was found beside a dead clone trooper. He then found a group of three survivors who tried to charge a heavy Trandoshan mercenary when he went to investigate a clone trooper who flew into the room. After a tense fight in which three troopers were slaughtered, Boss continued on.<ref name="RC" />

Making his way through damaged corridors while fighting off Trandoshans and aiding surviving clone troopers, Boss rendezvoused with [[RC-1140/Legends|Fixer]], rescued [[Sev/Legends|Sev]] from interrogation, and broke [[Scorch/Legends|Scorch]] out of a detention cell. After rendezvousing, Delta Squad began encountering droids.<ref name="RC" />

Upon reaching the bridge, the Deltas destroyed the sensor jammer. 01/425 then accessed the ship's systems, providing them with information they needed. The squad then proceeded to one of the ship's hangars to destroy the [[Trandoshan dropship]] docked there and acting as a command center for the enemy.<ref name="RC" />

The situation immediately worsened when a [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class Droid Control Ship]] appeared to salvage the ship, as part of a deal made between the Trandoshans and the Confederacy. Delta Advisor proceeded to send out a distress signal, which was answered by the ''Acclamator''-class assault ship [[Arrestor (Acclamator-class)|''Arrestor'']]. [[Droid dispenser|Battle droid dispensers]] were sent into the starboard hangars of the ''Prosecutor'' as the Separatists prepared to claim their prize from the Trandoshans. Delta Squad was deployed to secure several hangars against the incoming wave of Confederate droids, and did so by destroying the hangar shield power regulators. With the regulators disabled, the hangar force fields intensified, preventing more dispensers from entering. With all avenues of capturing the ''Prosecutor'' now closed, the ''Lucrehulk'' opted to simply destroy the Republic ship instead.<ref name="RC" />

Fighting their way through the swarms of battle droids already taking control of the ship, Delta Squad arrived at an automated [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] control room where they set the controls to fire on the Droid Control Ship while simultaneously fighting off approaching droids. Together with the newly-arrived ''Arrestor'', their combined firepower proved too much for the Separatist ship, which was destroyed. As a result, all battle droids aboard the ''Prosecutor'' were deactivated.<ref name="RC" />

==Appearances==
